author: gregory-jagermeister
description: A fantasy content generator for all your TTRPG and world-building needs.

manifest.author: Gregory Jagermeister
manifest.description: A Fantasy Content Generator for Obsidian for All Your TTRPG / World Building Needs
manifest.name: Fantasy Content Generator

name: Fantasy Content Generator

releases.author: Gregory-Jagermeister
releases.description:
Fixed Settings in light mode so they are visible Again

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Gregory-Jagermeister/Fantasy-Content-Generator/compare/1.2.3...1.2.4

releases.author: Gregory-Jagermeister
releases.description:
Added a Command that allows you to access the fantasy content Generator window. simply open the command palette and type "open fantasy generator" and you should find it pretty quickly.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Gregory-Jagermeister/Fantasy-Content-Generator/compare/1.2.2...1.2.3

releases.author: Gregory-Jagermeister
releases.description:
This version Includes a New Generator which will generate Trading Posts (Thanks to Spectacular settlements by Nordic games for the inspiration, their book contains even more options then my generator so feel free to give it a look), you can now add weights to your loot Items in order to limit the amount of times an Item will occur, export the loot json to see an example.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Gregory-Jagermeister/Fantasy-Content-Generator/compare/1.2.1...1.2.2

releases.author: Gregory-Jagermeister
releases.description:
Added the ability to import and Export from JSON files, Export the data first so you can see how it's structured before importing anything, you may need to adjust yours to fit the profile

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Gregory-Jagermeister/Fantasy-Content-Generator/compare/1.2.0...1.2.1

releases.author: Gregory-Jagermeister
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Create LICENSE by @Gregory-Jagermeister in https://github.com/Gregory-Jagermeister/Fantasy-Content-Generator/pull/2
* Added Inline Generators for the Markdown Editor to quickly access generator functions.
* Reordered code to be neater.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Gregory-Jagermeister/Fantasy-Content-Generator/compare/1.1.1...1.2.0

releases.author: Gregory-Jagermeister
releases.description:
- New Generators (Dungeon and Plot Hooks)
- Revamped generator, which allows you to select multiple results and copy them to the clipboard.
- Some Little Bug fixes

To install Drag the folder from "fantasy-content-generator.zip" into your vaults ".obsidian/plugins" folder

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Gregory-Jagermeister/Fantasy-Content-Generator/compare/1.1.0...1.1.1

releases.author: Gregory-Jagermeister
releases.description:
This Release Adds the Ability to Use custom sources for some Generators, check the settings.
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Gregory-Jagermeister/Fantasy-Content-Generator/compare/1.0.1-a...1.1.0

releases.author: Gregory-Jagermeister
releases.description:
A Quick Bug fix that stopped you copying the correct name to the clipboard
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Gregory-Jagermeister/Fantasy-Content-Generator/compare/1.0.1...1.0.1-a
releases.name: 1.0.1-a
